reasoning: Based on FRED data analysis: The index shows a downward trend from 5.35% in Jan 2025 to 4.84% on 2025-11-07, though with recent volatility. The statistical trend analysis gives P(value > 4.84) of 0.31 for Nov 16, but the seasonal adjustment (looking at same period in prior years) increases this to 0.49. For longer horizons (Dec 9 and Feb 7), uncertainty increases and mean reversion becomes more likely, pushing probabilities slightly above 0.5. The recent uptick from 4.67% to 4.84% suggests some upward momentum, but the overall 2025 trend has been downward, creating balanced uncertainty.
